title: New character and new Eva screencaps
display_title: New character and new Eva screencaps
wikitext:
[]: New character and new Eva screencaps?             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Fri Dec 08, 2006 3:17 pm

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Fri Dec 08, 2006 3:22 pm pink hair? lol wut

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Dec 08, 2006 3:25 pm DO NOT WANT.

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Fri Dec 08, 2006 3:48 pm It's obviously not real. Haruko's not going to be in Eva...<_<

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Fri Dec 08, 2006 4:09 pm Oh, joy; Shinji's finally going to get some sense smacked into him. Hooray for leftie Rickenbackers!

[]:             Quote Post by Alfonso » Fri Dec 08, 2006 5:48 pm Is this real or not? I'm not familar with the anime Haruko is in, so I have no idea. XD Can someone post up the original scan of this page that's floating about somewhere?

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Fri Dec 08, 2006 7:08 pm Alfonso wrote: Is this real or not? I'm not familar with the anime Haruko is in, so I have no idea.

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Fri Dec 08, 2006 8:31 pm I wanna see if Haruko gives it to Shinji MOUTH TO MOUTH!!1! ...<.<[/u][/i][/b]

[]:             Quote Post by Millions Livio » Fri Dec 08, 2006 9:27 pm Actually, Haruko as an angel in Evangelion, being with Shinji would be rather interesting. It would fit Shinji's personality well, and cause similair problems that she caused in FLCL, perhaps, though more mentally corrupt. This is obviously fake, but I actually wouldn't mind something like that happening. As long as she was more serious, and not as wacky, and didn't take away from the EVA plot and mood.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Dec 08, 2006 9:35 pm

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Fri Dec 08, 2006 11:45 pm Holy swiss cheese on a stick batman! Theres no way in hell this is real, and if it is real I guess gainax made a monkey out of all of us! Haruko is my favorite female anime character so i wouldnt mind seeing more of her, but Im not sure if bringing her into eva would be the best idea.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sat Dec 09, 2006 12:34 am Proof it's a shop Found this old post of mine looking for that, though

[]:             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Sat Dec 09, 2006 6:14 am Still, new Eva screencaps mean something to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Alfonso » Sat Dec 09, 2006 10:15 am BobBQ wrote: Alfonso wrote: Is this real or not? I'm not familar with the anime Haruko is in, so I have no idea.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Dec 09, 2006 2:48 pm Aren't the NewType magazine images just drawings they made of the characters? Those little image blurbs are just from the old series. We haven't actually seen ONE image from this yet. Which makes me ask: Do you think they'd have the balls to physically change the appearance of the characters? I mean Rei would stay blue haired, red eyed but would the style in which she's drawn be done different? All I ask is no physically impossible big tittied women with Eva waists.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Dec 09, 2006 3:12 pm While it would be nice to contemplate the idea of Rei and Asuka looking more like Haruhi from Ouran, this is Gainax, home of the eponymous bounce, and with a track record in recent years of using tits instead of (as opposed to the previous "as well as") story. Shinji and Kaworu looking like Mizuho from Otome wa Trap or Jun from HasPenis, that I could well imagine.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Sat Dec 09, 2006 5:20 pm Well, we know that Sadamoto is doing the designs again, right? And Sadamoto, as good as he is, has a pretty recognizable style. So I expect this series to look like a more polished (and digitally inked?) version of the original. Haruko in Evangelion... wow. I have this vision of Evangelion turning into some kind of GAINAX Superfriends show where characters from other series turn up to help save the world.

[]:             Quote Post by Otaprince » Sat Dec 09, 2006 6:39 pm drinian wrote: Haruko in Evangelion... wow. I have this vision of Evangelion turning into some kind of GAINAX Superfriends show where characters from other series turn up to help save the world.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Dec 09, 2006 6:59 pm Otaprince wrote: drinian wrote: Haruko in Evangelion... wow. I have this vision of Evangelion turning into some kind of GAINAX Superfriends show where characters from other series turn up to help save the world.

[]:             Quote Post by AuthenticM » Sun Dec 10, 2006 6:49 pm drinian wrote: Well, we know that Sadamoto is doing the designs again, right?
